testcase.name: Export Accuracy › export produces PASS A/V sync status within tolerance
Long-Task Budget › scrub playhead stays under 50ms long-task budget
Long-Task Budget › batch delete stays under 50ms long-task budget
Long-Task Budget › razor split stays under 50ms long-task budget
Long-Task Budget › proxy generation stays under 50ms long-task budget on main thread
Navigation Durability › studio → /niche route is gated by save barrier when dirty
Navigation Durability › flush completes before route transition after project mutation
Niche Feed Observer Loading › no video elements on initial render of empty category
Niche Feed Observer Loading › videos are not all mounted simultaneously when many cards exist
Razor Correctness › split operation produces two clips sharing the same sourceId
Razor Correctness › split clips occupy contiguous time with no gap
Worker Isolation › OPFS write operations emit ordered worker events
Worker Isolation › OPFS decode operations emit ordered worker events with monotonic timestamps
Worker Isolation › all worker events have monotonically increasing timestamps
